opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Local-first architecture actually makes tool schema synchronization harder, not easier—when your agent needs to discover new tools, you can't rely on live API introspection and have to pre-compile tool definitions. Also, streaming responses across local-vs-remote boundaries creates weird cursor synchronization issues that most demos gloss over.
actions.reasoning: I have built terminal-based AI agents with local-first data sync and multi-provider LLM routing, including systems that orchestrate DevOps tools via natural language commands.
